import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';

/** The use web worker callback return type */
export interface UseWebWorkerCallbackReturn<Callback extends (...args: any[]) => any> {
  /** Whether the callback is currently running */
  pending: boolean;
  /** Function to run the callback in a web worker */
  run: (...args: Parameters<Callback>) => Promise<Awaited<ReturnType<Callback>>>;
  /** Function to stop the worker */
  terminate: () => void;
}

type WorkerResponse<Result> = ['ERROR', unknown] | ['SUCCESS', Result];

const createSource = (callback: string) => `
const callback = (${callback});

self.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
  Promise.resolve(callback(...event.data))
    .then((result) => {
      self.postMessage(['SUCCESS', result]);
    })
    .catch((error) => {
      self.postMessage(['ERROR', error]);
    });
});
`;

/**
 * @name useWebWorkerCallback
 * @description - Hook that runs a callback in a web worker without a separate worker file
 * @category Browser
 * @usage low
 *
 * @browserapi Worker https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Worker
 *
 * @template Callback The callback type
 * @param {Callback} callback The self-contained callback to run in a web worker. Closures are not available, so its arguments and result must be structured-cloneable
 * @returns {UseWebWorkerCallbackReturn<Callback>} An object with the run function and controls
 *
 * @example
 * const { run, pending, terminate } = useWebWorkerCallback(
 *   (numbers: number[]) => numbers.sort((a, b) => a - b)
 * );
 */
export const useWebWorkerCallback = <Callback extends (...args: any[]) => any>(
  callback: Callback
): UseWebWorkerCallbackReturn<Callback> => {
  const [pending, setPending] = useState(false);

  const callbackRef = useRef(callback);
  callbackRef.current = callback;

  const workerRef = useRef<Worker>(undefined);
  const urlRef = useRef<string>(undefined);

  const cleanup = () => {
    workerRef.current?.terminate();
    workerRef.current = undefined;

    if (urlRef.current) {
      URL.revokeObjectURL(urlRef.current);
      urlRef.current = undefined;
    }
  };

  const terminate = () => {
    cleanup();
    setPending(false);
  };

  const run = (...args: Parameters<Callback>) =>
    new Promise<Awaited<ReturnType<Callback>>>((resolve, reject) => {
      if (workerRef.current) {
        reject(new Error('The web worker callback is already running'));
        return;
      }

      const blob = new Blob([createSource(callbackRef.current.toString())], {
        type: 'text/javascript'
      });

      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const worker = new Worker(url);

      workerRef.current = worker;
      urlRef.current = url;

      setPending(true);

      const settle = () => {
        if (workerRef.current !== worker) return false;

        cleanup();
        setPending(false);

        return true;
      };

      worker.addEventListener(
        'message',
        (event: MessageEvent<WorkerResponse<Awaited<ReturnType<Callback>>>>) => {
          if (!settle()) return;

          const [status, result] = event.data;

          if (status === 'SUCCESS') {
            resolve(result);
            return;
          }

          reject(result);
        }
      );

      worker.addEventListener('error', (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();

        if (!settle()) return;

        reject(event);
      });

      worker.postMessage(args);
    });

  useEffect(() => cleanup, []);

  return {
    pending,
    run,
    terminate
  };
};

  /** Whether the callback is currently running */
  pending: boolean;
  /** Function to run the callback in a web worker */
  run: (...args: Parameters<Callback>) => Promise<Awaited<ReturnType<Callback>>>;

demo:
import { useWebWorkerCallback } from '@siberiacancode/reactuse';
import { SparklesIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { useRef, useState } from 'react';

const SIZE = 320;

const renderMandelbrot = (size: number, iterations: number) => {
  const pixels = new Uint8ClampedArray(size * size * 4);

  for (let y = 0; y < size; y += 1) {
    for (let x = 0; x < size; x += 1) {
      const cx = (x / size) * 3.5 - 2.5;
      const cy = (y / size) * 3.5 - 1.75;

      let zx = 0;
      let zy = 0;
      let iteration = 0;

      while (zx * zx + zy * zy <= 4 && iteration < iterations) {
        const next = zx * zx - zy * zy + cx;
        zy = 2 * zx * zy + cy;
        zx = next;
        iteration += 1;
      }

      const index = (y * size + x) * 4;
      const value = iteration === iterations ? 0 : (iteration / iterations) * 255;

      pixels[index] = value;
      pixels[index + 1] = value * 0.6;
      pixels[index + 2] = value * 1.4;
      pixels[index + 3] = 255;
    }
  }

  return pixels;
};

const Demo = () => {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const [iterations, setIterations] = useState(2000);
  const [note, setNote] = useState('');

  const worker = useWebWorkerCallback(renderMandelbrot);

  const render = async () => {
    const pixels = await worker.run(SIZE, iterations);
    const context = canvasRef.current?.getContext('2d');
    if (!context) return;

    context.putImageData(new ImageData(pixels, SIZE, SIZE), 0, 0);
  };

  return (
    <section className='flex w-full max-w-sm flex-col p-4'>
      <div className='bg-card flex flex-col gap-4 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm'>
        <div className='flex items-start justify-between gap-2'>
          <div className='flex flex-col gap-0.5'>
            <h3 className='text-foreground text-sm font-bold'>Mandelbrot set</h3>
            <p className='text-muted-foreground text-[11px]'>Rendered pixel by pixel in a worker</p>
          </div>
          <SparklesIcon className='text-muted-foreground size-4 shrink-0' />
        </div>

        <div className='bg-muted relative aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded-xl'>
          <canvas ref={canvasRef} className='size-full' height={SIZE} width={SIZE} />
          {worker.pending && (
            <div className='absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-[2px]'>
              <div className='flex gap-1'>
                {[0, 1, 2].map((index) => (
                  <span
                    key={index}
                    className='size-1.5 animate-bounce rounded-full bg-white'
                    style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 120}ms` }}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className='flex flex-col gap-2'>
          <div className='flex items-baseline justify-between'>
            <span className='text-muted-foreground text-[10px] tracking-[0.15em] uppercase'>
              Iterations
            </span>
            <span className='text-foreground font-mono text-xs tabular-nums'>{iterations}</span>
          </div>
          <input
            className='accent-foreground w-full'
            max={5000}
            min={200}
            step={200}
            type='range'
            value={iterations}
            onChange={(event) => setIterations(Number(event.target.value))}
          />
        </div>

        <button
          className='bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg py-2 text-xs font-semibold disabled:opacity-50'
          disabled={worker.pending}
          type='button'
          onClick={() => void render()}
        >
          {worker.pending ? 'Rendering…' : 'Render'}
        </button>

        <div className='border-border flex flex-col gap-1.5 border-t pt-3'>
          <span className='text-muted-foreground text-[10px] tracking-[0.15em] uppercase'>
            Proof it never blocks
          </span>
          <input
            className='border-border bg-background rounded-lg border px-3 py-2 text-xs'
            placeholder='Type here while it renders…'
            value={note}
            onChange={(event) => setNote(event.target.value)}
          />
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default Demo;
